title: Verify existing implementation of request timing middleware
description: The request timing middleware already exists at `src/middleware/request-timing.ts` with `X-Response-Time` header functionality. Integration tests at `src/middleware/request-timing.test.ts` pass (9 tests). Task appears to be complete.
existing_patterns: src/middleware/request-logger.ts - Express-style middleware factory pattern with config object and createX naming
